programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: The bottom three cooks from yesterday's Mystery Box must now fight to save their spot in the competition. Today's Pressure Test is set by award-winning pastry chef and culinary innovator Philip Khoury.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Briony May Williams and a buyer from London tour properties in rural Somerset and Dorset.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The remaining competitors receive a Mystery Box challenge based on the foods of the future with a special surprise twist.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez's investigation into the death of a chess hustler is complicated by interference from the victim's son; Jamie tries to make amends with a man he regrets putting away as a young officer.

programme.desc: Danny reunites with childhood friend and a former criminal Mickey Patrick, who comes to him for help finding his missing fiancée; Anthony surprises Erin with one last stakeout before her run for district attorney.
